description_long: This object is a classic over-under double-barrel shotgun, featuring a long, blued steel barrel assembly with a ventilated rib running along the top for improved sighting. The receiver is metallic and appears robust, connecting the barrels to a full wooden stock and forend, both finished in a dark, polished wood grain. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, protecting a single visible trigger. The shotgun's break-action hinge is subtly visible at the receiver, indicating the mechanism for loading and unloading shells. The overall design is sleek and traditional, with no visible modern attachments or embellishments. The finish is a mix of matte and glossy, with the wood providing a rich contrast to the metallic components.
description: A traditional over-under double-barrel shotgun with a polished wooden stock, metallic receiver, and long blued barrels with a ventilated rib.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metallic receiver, and the length of the over-under barrels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the ventilated rib along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and the full length of the barrels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrels and rib.
attribute_barrel_configuration: over-under double-barrel with a ventilated rib along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
